animals.name: Deshi Shahi Cow
animals.description: This healthy deshi cow is raised with natural খাবার and proper care. It has a strong body structure and is well-suited for Qurbani. নিয়মিত খাওয়ানো ও পরিচর্যার কারণে এটি সম্পূর্ণ সুস্থ এবং প্রস্তুত।

animals.name: Australian Cow
animals.description: Imported Australian breed cow with excellent health and large body size. It is raised with high-quality feed and proper farm management. Ideal for those looking for premium Qurbani animals.

animals.name: Sahiwal Cow
animals.description: Sahiwal breed is known for its meat quality and strong health condition. This cow is well-fed and properly maintained in a clean environment. Suitable for medium to large Qurbani needs.

animals.name: Friesian Cow
animals.description: Large Friesian cow with impressive weight and strong build. নিয়মিত পুষ্টিকর খাবার ও যত্নের মাধ্যমে এটি বড় করা হয়েছে। Perfect for high-budget Qurbani buyers.

animals.name: Deshi Medium Cow
animals.description: This medium-sized deshi cow is perfect for small families. It is healthy, সক্রিয় এবং ভালোভাবে লালন-পালন করা হয়েছে। Budget-friendly yet reliable option for Qurbani.

animals.name: Brahman Cow
animals.description: Strong Brahman breed cow with high durability and large body size. It is raised under expert supervision and proper feeding schedule. Best choice for premium Qurbani.

animals.name: Black Bengal Goat
animals.description: Black Bengal goat is widely popular for its tender meat and strong immunity. এটি স্থানীয়ভাবে পালন করা হয়েছে এবং সম্পূর্ণ সুস্থ। Ideal for small Qurbani.

animals.name: Jamunapari Goat
animals.description: Jamunapari goat is known for its tall structure and সুন্দর চেহারা। Proper nutrition and care ensure its healthy growth. ভালো মানের Qurbani এর জন্য উপযুক্ত।

animals.name: Beetal Goat
animals.description: Beetal goat with ভালো ওজন এবং শক্তিশালী শরীর। It is raised in a clean farm environment with balanced feeding. Suitable for medium Qurbani needs.

animals.name: Deshi Goat
animals.description: Affordable deshi goat raised with natural খাবার। Healthy, active, and ভালো condition এ আছে। Best choice for budget Qurbani.

animals.name: Kashmiri Goat
animals.description: Premium Kashmiri goat with thick fur and strong health condition. Properly maintained and fed regularly. High-quality option for Qurbani buyers.

animals.name: Hybrid Goat
animals.description: Hybrid goat with fast growth and balanced body weight. নিয়মিত যত্ন ও সঠিক খাবার দেওয়া হয়েছে। Reliable and popular choice for Qurbani.

animals.name: Local Sheep
animals.description: Local sheep raised in গ্রামের পরিবেশে। Healthy and ভালোভাবে লালন-পালন করা হয়েছে। Small Qurbani এর জন্য উপযুক্ত।

animals.name: Garole Sheep
animals.description: Garole breed sheep known for its শক্তিশালী রোগ প্রতিরোধ ক্ষমতা। It is properly maintained and healthy. Suitable for medium Qurbani.

animals.name: Merino Sheep
animals.description: Merino sheep with high-quality wool and ভালো শারীরিক গঠন। Proper feeding ensures its health and growth. Premium Qurbani option.

animals.name: Hybrid Sheep
animals.description: Hybrid sheep with balanced growth and ভালো ওজন। It is raised under proper care and feeding. Suitable for medium-level Qurbani.

animals.name: Fat Tail Sheep
animals.description: Fat Tail sheep known for rich meat quality and ভালো স্বাস্থ্য। Properly fed and maintained. Ideal for quality Qurbani experience.

animals.name: Premium Sheep
animals.description: Premium local sheep raised with extra care and ভালো খাবার। Healthy, active, and ready for Qurbani. Reliable choice for buyers.
